Eye Jogia Photography is an award-winning London-based destination wedding photographer specialising in luxury Indian, Hindu, Sikh, Muslim, and civil weddings. Combining discreet documentary coverage with fashion-inspired portraiture, Eye Jogia creates stunning visual narratives of your special day.
